name: tts-cpp
description: Text-to-speech inference in pure C++/ggml. Ships Resemble Chatterbox (Turbo + Multilingual variants) and Supertonic engines under a unified Engine API. Sourced from tetherto/qvac-ext-lib-whisper.cpp's tts-cpp/ subfolder. This pin (master a679c7e7) brings QVAC-19557 chatterbox iOS-memory work (PR #43): streamed GGUF loads (no full-file host staging) and selectable KV-cache dtype (EngineOptions::kv_cache_type = f32|f16|q8_0; q8_0 ~27% of f32) with a capability probe + F32 fallback and a Vulkan q8_0->f32 guard. Layered on the b95ad447 base — QVAC-20616 end-of-speech robustness (PR #53) and QVAC-20557 Supertonic Android GPU (PR #54: Adreno OpenCL + Xclipse/Mali Vulkan, which also routes the CPU-backend calls through ggml-base + a registry shim for Android dlopen). Consumes the ggml-speech port.
